name: Sim: Seating - Seat recliner broken on ZA808
scenario_description: Passenger found seat recliner mechanism completely broken (stuck upright). Cabin crew said nothing could be done mid-flight.
complaint_description: On flight ZA808 on March 9 2026 I was assigned seat 34A. After boarding I found the seat recliner lever was broken off and the seat cannot recline at all. It was a long haul flight to Tokyo. When I reported this to the cabin crew before pushback they said maintenance had been informed but no alternative seat was offered because the flight was full. I sat upright for the entire flight. I am requesting partial fare compensation and confirmation that the aircraft has been taken out of service for repair.
